text:
There once was a village filled with friendly frogs. Every evening, they would gather by the pond, call out to each other, jump into the water, and sing lovely melodies. One frog, though, had a terrible voice.

Arthur was a tiny frog. Whenever he sang anything, it sounded more like a distressed squeak. Even the birds refused to listen. He wanted to sing.

One day, inspiration struck. Arthur decided to turn his weakness into something magical. He searched deep within his croaky voice and began crafting a song so powerful, so heartwarming, it could make even stone proud.

The next evening, he sat quietly, thinking. And then--

*ding*

Suddenly, the pond shimmered, and countless frogs emerged, their voices strong and melodic. Arthur croaked cheerfully, and they filled the air with joyous songs. His song had transformed into something wonderful.

From that day on, Arthur sang whenever he felt down. He sang about love, friendship,
